CustomField.description: Comma-separated list of promo codes the member has entered against this cart. Persists across navigate-away so the applied code list survives a refresh. Written by the apply-flow LWC; cleared on Order Activation. See docs/promo-code/checkout-apply-flow.md §4.1.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Comma-separated list of promo codes the member entered at checkout, persisted across navigation within the same Order.
CustomField.label: Promo Codes Entered
